title: Payment
description: defines the payment in transfer reservation. For "CREDIT_CARD" - creditCard is mandatory, for "TRAVEL_ACCOUNT" - paymentReference is optional, for "PAYMENT_SERVICE_PROVIDER" - paymentServiceProvider and paymentReference are mandatory.

methodOfPayment.description: Method of payment required when PaymentType equal BT (applicable only for reservation action).

paymentReference.description: payment refence that will be passed to provider in case "TRAVEL_ACCOUNT" method of payment

paymentServiceProvider.description: payment service provider details will be passed to provider in case "PAYMENT_SERVICE_PROVIDER" method of payment.

vendorCode.description: card vendor code, e.g VI – VISA, CA – MasterCard, AX – American Express etc

expiryDate.description: card expiry date in format MMYY, e.g. 0237 for February 2037

cvv.description: cerification calue number, as indicated on the credit card. Only for query
